description_long: This is a modern, rectangular wooden cabinet with a light, natural wood grain finish and a minimalist design. The front features two white-faced drawers with small, square metallic handles, providing concealed storage. The cabinet stands on four angled legs, which are painted a dark gray and add a mid-century modern flair. The top surface is flat and spacious, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain pattern continuing seamlessly. The overall construction appears sturdy, making it suitable for use in living rooms, offices, or urban public spaces.
description: A modern, light wood cabinet with two white drawers and angled dark gray legs, featuring a flat top and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing a plain white panel with no visible handles or drawer separations.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood grain texture and the depth of the cabinet, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_2: Front view with two white drawers, each with a small metallic handle, and the angled legs clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain and depth without any visible drawers or handles.
